meaning: n.[总]重炮,炮术,射击,射击学,枪炮操作
examples: During the Second World War the area was used for gunnery practice.
It's a poem about gunnery practice.
A gunnery sergeant was called over to check it out.
The UH-1N Huey was on a routine training mission in the Naval gunnery range.
It was reported in May that sailors at HMS Cambridge, a gunnery school near Plymouth, would shout Bang!
